creator: cstdenis@ctgameinfo.com
text:
Databases/gdbm tries to install compat6x-amd64 as a dependancy.

# pkg upgrade gdbm
New packages to be INSTALLED:
        compat6x-amd64: 6.4.604000.200810_3

Installed packages to be UPGRADED:
        gdbm: 1.12 -> 1.13_1
        readline: 6.3.8 -> 7.0.3



I think this is caused, not by an actual need for compat6x, but by the unrelated COMPAT option in the port for "dbm/ndbm compatibility". 

If this is the case, the option in the port and it's plist should be renamed to not conflict.
